member.name: T:AttendanceSystem.Domain.Common.AggregateRoot
member.summary: Aggregate root with domain event collection.

member.name: T:AttendanceSystem.Domain.Common.BaseEntity
member.summary: Base type for all domain entities with identity and audit timestamps.

member.name: T:AttendanceSystem.Domain.Common.IDomainEvent
member.summary: Marker for domain events raised by aggregates.

member.name: T:AttendanceSystem.Domain.Entities.AttendanceRecord
member.summary: Daily attendance record for an employee including check-in/out and computed metrics.
Creates a new check-in record.

member.name: M:AttendanceSystem.Domain.Entities.AttendanceRecord.CheckOut(System.DateTime,AttendanceSystem.Domain.Enums.AttendanceStatus,System.TimeSpan,System.Decimal,AttendanceSystem.Domain.Enums.VerificationMethod,System.Nullable{System.Double},System.Nullable{System.Double},System.String)
member.summary: Completes check-out and updates status, break, and overtime.

member.name: M:AttendanceSystem.Domain.Entities.AttendanceRecord.ApplyAdjustment(System.Nullable{System.DateTime},System.Nullable{System.DateTime},AttendanceSystem.Domain.Enums.AttendanceStatus,System.Decimal,System.Decimal,System.Nullable{System.TimeSpan},System.Guid)
member.summary: Updates metrics after admin-approved time adjustment.

member.name: T:AttendanceSystem.Domain.Entities.AuditLog
member.summary: Immutable audit trail for data changes.

member.name: T:AttendanceSystem.Domain.Entities.Department
member.summary: Organizational department with optional parent and department head.

member.name: T:AttendanceSystem.Domain.Entities.Employee
member.summary: Employee master data linked to identity user and work configuration.

member.name: T:AttendanceSystem.Domain.Entities.GpsPing
member.summary: Continuous GPS ping from mobile for auto geo check-in logic.

member.name: T:AttendanceSystem.Domain.Entities.Holiday
member.summary: Public or company holiday affecting attendance rules.

member.name: T:AttendanceSystem.Domain.Entities.LeaveRequest
member.summary: Leave request including auto-generated birthday leave.

member.name: T:AttendanceSystem.Domain.Entities.Notification
member.summary: Stored notification for in-app history and multi-channel delivery tracking.

member.name: T:AttendanceSystem.Domain.Entities.NotificationTemplate
member.summary: Localized notification template with variable placeholders.

member.name: T:AttendanceSystem.Domain.Entities.OfficeLocation
member.summary: Geofenced office or branch location for GPS verification.

member.name: T:AttendanceSystem.Domain.Entities.OutboxMessage
member.summary: Outbox entry for reliable async notification processing.

member.name: T:AttendanceSystem.Domain.Entities.Permission
member.summary: Fine-grained permission for RBAC.

member.name: T:AttendanceSystem.Domain.Entities.RefreshToken
member.summary: JWT refresh token with rotation support.

member.name: T:AttendanceSystem.Domain.Entities.RolePermission
member.summary: Join entity between roles and permissions.

member.name: T:AttendanceSystem.Domain.Entities.SuspiciousActivityAlert
member.summary: Alert raised when suspicious attendance patterns are detected.

member.name: T:AttendanceSystem.Domain.Entities.TimeAdjustmentRequest
member.summary: Employee request to correct attendance times with admin approval workflow.

member.name: T:AttendanceSystem.Domain.Entities.WorkSchedule
member.summary: Configurable work shift with grace period and break policy.

member.name: T:AttendanceSystem.Domain.Enums.AttendanceStatus
member.summary: Daily attendance classification for an employee.

member.name: T:AttendanceSystem.Domain.Enums.ContractType
member.summary: Employee contract classification.

member.name: T:AttendanceSystem.Domain.Enums.LeaveType
member.summary: Types of employee leave.

member.name: T:AttendanceSystem.Domain.Enums.NotificationChannel
member.summary: Delivery channel for notifications.

member.name: T:AttendanceSystem.Domain.Enums.RequestStatus
member.summary: Approval workflow status for leave and time adjustment requests.

member.name: T:AttendanceSystem.Domain.Enums.ReviewStatus
member.summary: Admin review status for suspicious activity alerts.

member.name: T:AttendanceSystem.Domain.Enums.SuspiciousAlertType
member.summary: Categories of suspicious attendance activity.

member.name: T:AttendanceSystem.Domain.Enums.VerificationMethod
member.summary: How attendance was verified at check-in or check-out.

member.name: T:AttendanceSystem.Domain.Enums.WorkDays
member.summary: Bit flags for scheduled work days (Mon–Sun).

member.summary: Raised when an employee checks in.

member.summary: Raised when an employee checks in.

member.summary: Raised when an employee checks out.
